sql: Practice joins, aggregations, and subqueries on real datasets.
python: Build 2 mini automation scripts and one data project using clean functions.
machine learning: Train one end-to-end model and explain metrics, assumptions, and trade-offs.
data visualization: Create clear charts and dashboards from one business-style dataset.
power bi: Build an interactive dashboard with KPI cards, filters, and insights.
tableau: Create a dashboard story and narrate trends with actionable findings.
pandas: Practice data cleaning, grouping, merging, and feature engineering using CSV datasets.
numpy: Practice arrays, broadcasting, vectorized operations, and numerical computations.
flask: Build a simple API-backed project and deploy it with clean route structure.
django: Build one CRUD web app with authentication and model relationships.
react: Build one component-based frontend with reusable state-driven UI blocks.
javascript: Practice ES6 fundamentals, array methods, async patterns, and DOM handling.
communication: Rewrite project bullets with impact metrics and clear outcome statements.
project: Create at least one portfolio project with README, architecture, and results section.
internship: Simulate internship-style deliverables with timeline, ownership, and outcomes.
resume quality: Use clear section headers, bullet points, and measurable achievements in each section.
